creator: @quebert
executive_summary: The April 11, 2026 Tododeia moderate strategy concentrates on the full AI semiconductor supply chain from foundry (TSM) to GPU compute (NVDA) to custom ASIC/networking (AVGO) and alternative GPU (AMD), validated by a confirmed +35% Q1 revenue pre-announcement from TSMC ahead of April 16 earnings. Gold and Silver provide a dual-layer macro hedge in a 3.3% CPI environment with a weak dollar and central bank accumulation. BTC is sized as a 15% contrarian asymmetric position at Extreme Fear (F&G 15). Portfolio: 55% stocks / 20% materials / 15% crypto / 10% cash.

Risk appetite is bifurcated: institutional accumulation occurring simultaneously in AI semis and gold while crypto sentiment sits at extreme fear. Geopolitical tension is partially reduced by the US-Iran ceasefire, collapsing oil's risk premium but redirecting capital flows into structural growth and inflation-hedge assets.
